exampleHelp: Add a JSON file that follows the case schema without changing the chat UI code.
chatDescription: The clinician enters the chief complaint and Gemini follows the selected prompt to ask and structure information.
messageInputLabel: Enter chief complaint or additional information
messagePlaceholder: Enter the chief complaint, history, or observations…
voiceDisclaimer: Voice transcripts must be reviewed by the clinician before sending.
summaryEmpty: Load an example to display a SOAP summary; regular responses appear in the chat.
defaultSafetyReminder: This content supports documentation only and does not replace clinical assessment, diagnosis, or prescribing.
